---
title: "Nure Hasana"
description: |
  Research Assistant, Get Learn Bioinformatics
  
  3rd Year Student of Biochemistry and Molecular Biology at Jagannath University.

image: "image.jpg" 
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
---
::: {#hero-heading}

Nure Hasana is actively involved in learning and applying protein modeling, molecular docking, structure analysis, and bioinformatics workflows. Her work supports GLB’s computational biology learning and research activities.

---
**Key Contributions:**  

- Supports computational biology and bioinformatics-based research activities
- Practices protein structure analysis and molecular docking workflows
- Contributes to research learning and student skill development
- Assists in maintaining structured and reproducible computational workflows
:::
